hooks.command: printf '[AI SYSTEM] Date: %s | Log: .ai/logs/%s.md | If this is your first response this session: follow the session-start protocol in CLAUDE.md before doing anything else.' "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)" "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
printf '[AI SYSTEM] If you made file changes this turn, append a log entry to .ai/logs/%s.md now.' "$(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
